\multicolumn{8}{p{0.98\textwidth}}{\textit{Notes:} OLS LPM with \texttt{closure\_event} as outcome. Coefficient row shows $\hat{\beta}$; model row shows analytic cluster-robust SE in parentheses (clustered at state, $G=18$); bootstrap row shows wild cluster bootstrap SE in brackets (score-based variant, robust to high-dimensional FE; Rademacher weights; $B=9{,}999$; bootstrap SE $=$ CI half-width / 1.96). \texttt{did\_term} $=$ \texttt{texas\_treated} $\times$ $\mathbf{1}\{\text{year} \geq 1998\}$. Sample: active-at-treatment tanks (facility had $\geq 1$ open or newly installed tank on 1998-12-22), unweighted. Mandate controls $=$ \texttt{mandate\_release\_det}, \texttt{mandate\_spill\_overfill}, \texttt{mandate\_integrity}. State-level absorption is enforced in every column: explicit $\alpha_s$ in cols 1, 2, 5; implicit via the nested unit FE (facility / tank) in cols 3, 4, 6, 7. Col~(7) is the main specification.}
